nasb.text: You will not escape from his hand, for you will surely be captured and delivered into his hand; and you will see the king of Babylon eye to eye, and he will speak with you face to face, and you will go to Babylon.’ ” ’

esv.text: You shall not escape from his hand but shall surely be captured and delivered into his hand. You shall see the king of Babylon eye to eye and speak with him face to face. And you shall go to Babylon.’

cnv.text: 你必逃不出他的手，必被拿住，交在他的手中。你必親眼看見巴比倫王，他必親口和你說話；你也必到巴比倫去。’

ccb.text: 你必逃不出巴比伦王的手心，你必在他面前受审，被带到巴比伦。
